title: デビュー戦の後に・かちてー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished her debut race, Tosen Jordan
feels a passion for racing burning from within.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she isn't getting as much attention as other
runners right now... she vows again to make it big.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But to do that, she has to prove her skills first! To
that end, I recommend we set our sights on the
Hopeful Stakes, a junior G1.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't tell me, but she begins reading up on
the race on her own.
